---
title: "Sample Course Materials"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Biostatistics

::: {#posts_biostatistics_primer_2025}
:::

{{< pdf courses/sample_courses/biostatistics/biostatistics_primer_2025.pdf width=800 height=450 >}}

## Data Structures in Bioinformatics

::: {#posts_data_struct_bioinf_2025}
:::

{{< pdf courses/sample_courses/data_struct_bioinf/data_struct_bioinf_2025.pdf width=800 height=450 >}}
